1 

SOURCE: Medicare Advantage Organizations (MAOs) 

FILE(S): Carrier base 
DME base 

VALUES: Blank = ICD-9 
9 = ICD-9 
0 = ICD-10 

COMMENT: With 5010, the diagnosis and procedure codes have been expanded to accommodate ICD-10. 

On October 1, 2015, the conversion from the ninth version of the International Classification of 
Diseases (ICD-9-CM) to version 10 (ICD-10-CM) occurred.
